title: What It Takes to Preserve Floppy Disks
summary: Floppy disks are several decades old—many of the disks are degrading and the data stored on them is at risk of being lost. In response, Leontien Talboom, a technical analyst at Cambridge University Libraries and Archives, led a roughly year-long project preserving floppy disks called “Future Nostalgia,” which concluded in January.Leontien TalboomLeontien Talboom is a technical analyst at Cambridge University Libraries and Archives, where she transfers material from a wide range of storage media

title: Nike World Cup Uniforms Made of Recycled Textiles Won’t Solve Fashion Waste
summary: The activewear giant has used chemical recycling to make jersey for 16 teams competing in the tournament. But the technique is unlikely to help solve fashion’s waste issue.
